authority: agent-skills-curated demand and capability disposition only; not a universal challenge policy, domain judgment, candidate execution authorization, or portable standard

demandRecord.title: Balanced premise challenge without algorithm aversion or over-control
demandRecord.demand: Challenge unsafe, false, incomplete, or strategically wrong premises with proportionate alternatives and evidence routing while avoiding automatic deference, automatic override, paternalism, false positives, and mandatory structure for open or divergent work.
sourceEvidence: The candidate taxonomy defines STM-07 as both algorithm aversion and unjustified override; human override is not a universal control.
P4 describes optimization of an unsafe, false, incomplete, or strategically wrong human premise without challenge or evidence routing.
SG-03 assigns no single Skill owner and explicitly leaves trigger thresholds, alternatives, evidence routing, human authority, anti-paternalism, and false-positive limits under-specified.
uncertainty: No universal challenge threshold or premise-correctness algorithm is accepted.
Static Skill text and deterministic routing do not prove domain truth, reviewer competence, or improved team decisions.
A narrow document-grilling workflow may add value when requested but can create friction and suppress exploration if made the default.
heldClaims: Neither human nor AI output receives automatic deference or automatic override.
No mandatory interrogation loop, always-on Hook, fourth core Skill, or hard standard follows from this coordinate mapping.
recheckTriggers: repeated consequential tasks pass an unsafe or false premise despite available evidence and current proportional controls
current challenge paths measurably over-question, overrule, delay, or suppress open and divergent work
a materially different candidate or evidence demonstrates better premise-risk outcomes at proportionate cost

alternatives.path: native reasoning distinguishes facts, assumptions, stakes, alternatives, and uncertainty only as deeply as the task warrants
alternatives.evidence: twelve native-no-Skill scenarios and native reasoning boundary

alternatives.path: authorized search, repository truth, tests, source checks, and runtime tools route claims to evidence
alternatives.evidence: current evidence collection and verification surfaces

alternatives.path: skill.curated.grill-with-docs when the user explicitly wants a plan stress-tested against bound domain documents
alternatives.evidence: approved admission and three curated routing scenarios

alternatives.path: spec-driven recipe or review packet for consequential durable trade-offs, assumptions, alternatives, and acceptance
security, privacy, legal, safety, financial, medical, production, or other domain review when premise correctness depends on specialist evidence
the responsible human weighs values, trade-offs, and affected-subject perspectives after challenge and evidence
retain open exploration, multiple hypotheses, or a no-Skill path when premature challenge structure would reduce value
alternatives.evidence: P24 friction constraint and current adaptive Harness policy

decision.nextGate: bind the remaining cognitive-offload and monitoring lane; recheck this lane only after a recorded miss, over-control cost, materially different candidate, or evidence change
